reviews.review_description: While I installed this game while randomly scrolling through the rabbit hole known as app lab, I found it to be somewhat enjoyable. Despite the clunky controls, it could be a great game if executed properly. As I’m learning unity myself, I know how much of a pain gamedev is. I wish you luck in the future, I did enjoy playing this unironically.

I mean I like the way they added ragdoll physics but it seems kind of basic and pale but overall it's a okay game if you're going to play this game on your free time it's funny how the zombies look like they're straight from a website if you know what I mean AKA downloaded model but it's okay so if you're willing to play this game go ahead no one stopping you just be warned that's kind of a small project so don't think too much of it that's all I have to say.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, thanks for your review!
Yeah, the ragdolls aren't that impressive yet, and models are indeed from Kenney most likely and the asset store, this is most likely so i can work more on the functionality of the game, but I'm slowly working on changing the models, for some more realistic zombies, and objects for maps too!

reviews.review_description: Not to bad but the controls are really clumsy and reaching for gun platforms puts you on top of the so you can’t reach the ammo or guns.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! I'm currently working on the platforms, they have a small collider issue I've noticed, I"l try to make the controls less clumsy.
